nasb.text: And he supposed that his brethren understood that God was granting them deliverance through him, but they did not understand.

esv.text: He supposed that his brothers would understand that God was giving them salvation by his hand, but they did not understand.

cnv.text: 他以為同胞們都必知道　神要藉著他的手拯救他們，事實上他們卻不知道。

ccb.text: 摩西以为同胞们会明白上帝要借着他的手拯救他们，可是他们并不明白。

csbs.text: 摩西以为自己的同胞会领悟神是藉着他的手拯救他们，但他们却不领悟。
